scope: S13 single- and multi-instance gold approval transaction
invariants: every instance passes the non-overridable QC preflight before approval
all pN packages for one image are approved and frozen as one transaction
DVC registration is invoked once at the image root, never once per instance
any package-finalization or DVC exception restores every prepared package byte-for-byte
partial snapshot creation cleans up all snapshots already created
pN discovery and validation remain correct above nine instances

rollback_cases: single-package DVC failure restores the exact prepared tree
multi-instance image-level DVC failure restores every exact prepared tree
tests.success_case: two instances freeze together and DVC receives exactly the common image root

human_authority: No CVAT correction or approval credit claimed; the current live task set remains pending Kevin's manual review.
